title: MoreDefaultArmor
description: This mod adds more armor of default materials of minecraft vanilla.
body:
MoreDefaultArmor
---
![All armor sets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6mQrkYzU/images/968b620c23b04d5a9e54347f55d6766f81bc8b1a.png)

The MoreDefaultArmor mod is an intriguing expansion for Minecraft that enriches the gameplay experience by introducing a variety of new armors made from the game's standard materials. From rustic oak armor to shiny emerald armor, this mod expands the ways you equip and protect your character in the world of Minecraft.

**These new armors are added by this mod**:

Overworld:

Dirt Armor, Oak Log Armor, Cobblestone Armor, Andesite Armor, Diorite Armor, Granite Armor & Cobbled Deepslate Armor

Nether:

Netherrack Armor

End:

End Stone Armor

*more coming soon...*

**Why you should use these armors**:

By cleverly combining the different armors with their multiple strengths, you create a wide range of variations for your custom armor set.

**Why you should download this project**:

More variety: the MoreDefaultArmor mod allows you to create and wear a wide range of armor from the game's well-known materials. This variety adds a refreshing touch to your game and opens up new strategic possibilities, depending on the material you use.

Customization: this mod gives you the freedom to customize your armor according to your own style. Choose from different designs and protection levels to create an armor that perfectly fits your play style.

Overcome Challenges: With the advanced armor options, you can better prepare yourself for the different challenges in the world of Minecraft. Equip yourself with the right armor to stand up to fiery creatures in the Netherworld or protect yourself from the dangerous creatures in the depths of your Minecraft universe.

**[Support Discord](https://discord.gg/KWXhgWjbjF)**

**IMPORTENT: THE MOD IS IN ALPHA PHASE AND CONTAINS LITTLE ARMOR**
